DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APRIL 19, 2013 TO GIVE PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 10, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC,
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Mariya Eskina.
Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Chiahui Mixon pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC., and against Defendant Mariya Eskina.
Principal $3,165.46
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $360.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $3,525.96
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, Llc'S Motion To Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. (415-922-5939) Specially Appearing for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC; No other appearances.

The tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC'S Motion To Compel Response To Discovery is Granted, for reasons set forth in moving papers and motion is unopposed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion To Compel Response To Discovery
is ontinued on the court's own motion to April 19, 2013 to give Portfolio Recovery Associates the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Portfolio Recovery Associates must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 10, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Paul Renne, Judge Pro-Tem, Cynthia Herbert, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/jpt
